dados.permAnalyticsDesc: Continuous improvement of the app experience. No personally identifiable data is collected.

dePINInfo.headline: Human Activity DePIN
dePINInfo.headlineDesc: The first app that turns real user activity into verifiable on-chain proof, with private redeem via ZK.
dePINInfo.pillarRealActivityDesc: Every minute of charging generates a verifiable proof of human presence on the Solana network.
dePINInfo.pillarZKDesc: Zero-Knowledge Proofs guarantee your activity is authentic without exposing your personal data.
dePINInfo.pillarPrivateDesc: Via Cloak Protocol, convert points into SOL without a traceable link between the app and your wallet.
dePINInfo.faqQ1: Will CNB Mobile become JUICE Mobile?
dePINInfo.faqA1: Yes. CNB Mobile is the legacy name; we're migrating the public brand to JUICE. The app, your account and your points stay the same.
dePINInfo.faqA2: DePIN (Decentralized Physical Infrastructure Network) is a network where real users contribute physical infrastructure — in our case, charging activity — in exchange for on-chain rewards.
dePINInfo.faqA3: Each minute charging, the app submits a proof of human presence to the Solana network. Points are credited automatically after each session.
dePINInfo.faqQ4: What is the Solana wallet for?
dePINInfo.faqA4: It's where your tokens arrive after redeem. You can use the wallet generated in the app or connect an external one (Phantom, Solflare).
dePINInfo.faqA5: Zero-Knowledge Proofs validate your activity without revealing your personal data. No one can link your account to an on-chain address.
dePINInfo.faqA6: Via Cloak Protocol: your points become SOL without leaving an on-chain trail between the project and your destination wallet.
dePINInfo.faqQ7: How long until I receive my tokens?
dePINInfo.faqA7: CNB redeems are instant on Solana. PIX withdrawals within 72 hours. Private redeems within a few minutes.
dePINInfo.faqQ8: Can I use it on more than one device?
dePINInfo.faqA8: Your account is unique. For security, signing in on a new device ends the previous session.

modoEscolha.title: Choose your mode

modoEscolha.liteDesc: The essentials: charging, missions, ranking and PIX withdrawal. ZK privacy stays accessible from your profile.

relatorio.title: Request Account Report
relatorio.subtitle: Export of your personal data
relatorio.description: Create a report with the settings and data of your JUICE account. This action will generate a file with the data and send it to the user's registered email within 72 hours.
relatorio.requestSentMsg: You will receive the report at {{email}} within 72 hours.
relatorio.deliveryNote: Delivery deadline is up to 72 hours after request. Check your spam folder if you don't receive it.
relatorio.errorSend: Could not send the report. Please try again.

swap.headline: Convert your CNB directly into SOL via Jupiter, with no network fees.
swap.viewExplorer: Tap to view on Solana Explorer ↗
swap.footerNote: Live quote via Jupiter. Network fee covered by Kora.

transfer.title: Send CNB
transfer.headline: Gasless transfer via Kora — no SOL needed in your wallet.
transfer.basicPrivacyDesc: Sends through a disposable intermediary wallet (2 hops). Hides the direct link between you and the destination, but it is not full ZK privacy.
transfer.viewExplorer: Tap to view on Solana Explorer ↗
transfer.footerNote: The network fee (~$0.0001) is covered by JUICE Mobile via the Kora paymaster.
transfer.errorSend: Failed to send. Please try again.

wallet.title: My JUICE Wallet
wallet.subtitle: Solana wallet generated on your device
wallet.emptyHint: Your CNB tokens will appear here after the first redeem.
wallet.proofsHint: Your charging sessions appear here after being recorded on Solana.
wallet.keyDesc: The private key of this wallet is generated and stored securely on your device. No server has access to it.
wallet.redeemDesc: When redeeming CNB, the tokens are sent directly to this address on the Solana network.
wallet.seedDesc: These 12 words are the only way to recover your wallet if you switch phones. Write it down on paper. Don't take photos or save it to the cloud.
wallet.restoreDesc: Enter your 12 recovery words separated by spaces.
wallet.noSeedMsg: This wallet was created before the backup system. The phrase cannot be displayed.
wallet.errorSeedLength: The phrase must have exactly 12 words.
wallet.errorSeedInvalid: Invalid phrase. Check the words and try again.
